get_interactions_by_document_ids.name: get_interactions_by_document_ids
get_interactions_by_document_ids.description: Fetch interaction records for specific document_ids from the SQLite interaction store. Use after another tool already identified promising source documents and you want dialogue or interaction evidence from those scenes. This is a targeted follow-up tool, not a broad search tool.

parameters.name: document_ids
parameters.description: List of document_ids whose interaction records should be returned.

parameters.name: interaction_type
parameters.description: Optional filter: 'dialogue' for spoken lines, 'interaction' for non-dialogue interactions, or omit for all.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rows to return. Default 100.

search_dialogues.name: search_dialogues
search_dialogues.description: Search dialogue records in SQLite. Use for who-said-what questions, speech content, addressed targets, scene-specific quotes, or speaker-list evidence. Prefer this when the answer depends on spoken lines rather than general narration.

parameters.name: object
parameters.description: Target or addressee name to match fuzzily.

parameters.name: section
parameters.description: Section or scene title to match fuzzily.

parameters.name: subsection
parameters.description: Subsection or sub-scene title to match fuzzily.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Dialogue content substring to match fuzzily.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rows to return. Default 20.

search_interactions.name: search_interactions
search_interactions.description: Search non-dialogue interaction records in SQLite. Use for social actions, physical interactions, attitudes, and polarity-sensitive relations between characters or entities. Prefer this over dialogue search when the question is about what happened between entities, not what was said.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Subject entity name to match fuzzily.

parameters.name: object
parameters.description: Object entity name to match fuzzily.

parameters.name: section
parameters.description: Section or scene title to match fuzzily.

parameters.name: subsection
parameters.description: Subsection or sub-scene title to match fuzzily.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Interaction content substring to match fuzzily.

parameters.name: polarity
parameters.description: Optional sentiment filter: positive, negative, or neutral.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rows to return. Default 20.
